rankings.reason: Provides the most practical, actionable step-by-step guide for first-time travelers while maintaining an engaging influencer tone.
Offers a very clear and logical process, though it lacks the personal, enthusiastic influencer voice requested.
The guide is too vague and lacks the specific step-by-step instructions required for a first-time traveler.
Fails to provide the required step-by-step guide for navigating the airport, focusing instead on general cultural tips.
